scope: AUTH_COMPLEX-quarantine migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (databases, pages, users); the full Notion API surface (blocks, comments, block children mutation, search-by-title, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B. The databases/pages endpoint entries below are declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is always POST for Notion's /search) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design §E.1 rule 4), matching the monday.com GraphQL golden's identical convention -- Notion's /search is a read-only query endpoint despite its POST wire verb.

excluded.reason: /blocks/{block_id}/children is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
/comments is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
(legacy notion connector is read-only; no write actions exist to port)
